name: Vanquisher
description:
Vladof launcher with a triple-barrel cannon that boosts rocket speed. It fires at very high RPM and will keep firing in full-auto while the trigger is held.

It typically has a large magazine, very low per-shot damage for a high-velocity launcher, and shaky accuracy. It shines against packs of mid-tier enemies and fast aircraft such as Buzzards, where the speed reduces the need to lead targets. Its rapid fire can drain even a maxed rocket reserve quickly, making sustained use costly.
notes:
Random world drop from appropriate loot sources.

It may play a reload even with no rockets in reserve, but the magazine remains empty.

special.description: Always rolls reduced ammo consumption: shots average 0.666 rockets each, effectively giving one free shot for every three fired.
